blocks.text: Suzuka at dawn: Russell and Antonelli four points apart
🏎️ Today 03:30 — Aramco Japanese GP, Suzuka — Russell (51pts) leads Antonelli (47pts) in title fight

Five races in and the 2026 championship is already a two-horse race. Russell holds the slimmest of leads over rookie Antonelli — Suzuka, where precision beats power, could be the first real separator.
♟️ Wed 16:00 — Magnus Carlsen opens FIDE Candidates 2026 — the road to the World Championship begins
🚴 Sun 11:00 — Gent-Wevelgem — Wærenskjold and Abrahamsen hunt Norway's best Spring Classic result
